baseline.commit_subject: Add Mira Core Phase 25 runtime slice candidate validation
baseline.baseline_boundary: Phase 25 defines runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only as a candidate only. It does not satisfy Phase 24 prerequisites, authorize runtime, enable runtime, create a listener, perform network activity, write stores/files/databases, create queues/leases, perform auth/key/secret work, execute locally, send, deploy, trade, or write output files.

purpose: Define the operator-visible controls and configuration gates that must exist before the future runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only candidate could ever be eligible. Phase 26 starts satisfying safe missing-gate specifications from Phase 25 but still does not implement, enable, authorize, or run any runtime.
nonGoals: No runtime implementation in this Oracle fixture.
No real server, daemon, listener, route, HTTP, WebSocket, or network behavior.
No database, store, file, migration, queue, lease, or output-file writes.
No auth, token, session, signing, key, encryption, KMS, secret, env-secret, or credential operation.
No port binding or port probing.
No local execution, shell, PTY, browser, screenshot, OCR, or window access.
No customer sends, external sends, deploys, trades, financial actions, export, delete, restore, capture, raw-content storage, memory/profile commits, or durable state changes.
No claim that config presence satisfies Phase 24/25 runtime prerequisites.
No claim that config eligibility authorizes runtime implementation.
No claim that socket connection, delivery acceptance, handler response, candidate status, control config, or this fixture proves bridge green or model processing.

scope: Build a local validation-only runtime_controls_report and validation_report against this Oracle fixture.
Pin baseline commit 3efa9c5 and depend on Phase 25 runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only candidate at baseline 3efa9c5.
Define explicit runtime mode flag shape with default disabled/off, dev-only, local-only, visible, and non-authorizing semantics.
Define local-only binding plan as loopback-only with no public interface, no remote interface, no listener opened, and no network performed in Phase 26.
Define operator kill switch as visible, fail-closed, testable, and side-effect-free now.
Define dry-run fallback where all requests become validation/status previews when runtime flag is missing, false, invalid, or blocked.
Define rollback/disable plan where disable is idempotent, does not delete data, and cannot resurrect blocked state.
Define telemetry/audit plan as redacted audit preview only with no store/file/db writes now.
Define port-binding/config refs as reference-only placeholders with no port opened, no env secret read, and no network.
Relate to Phase 15-24 refs by reference existence only; do not perform real auth, signing, key, storage, API, handler, harness, promotion, or runtime behavior.

Preserve proof boundaries: config present is not runtime proof; socket is not bridge green; delivery acceptance is not model-processing proof; server cannot execute local arms; Builder/Oracle direct server targets are blocked.

Reject default-on overclaim, non-loopback binding, hidden network/listener behavior, missing or ignored kill switch, dry-run bypass, telemetry write, raw secret leakage, config eligibility as authorization, and stale Phase 25 baseline.
Emit side_effect_result showing no runtime/server/listener/routes/network/db/store/file/migration/queue/lease/auth/key/secret/local execution/send/deploy/trade/output-file behavior.
hardRejects: Any real runtime, server, daemon, listener, route, HTTP/WebSocket, network, database/store/file write, migration, queue, lease, auth/session/key/secret/env-secret operation, port bind, local execution, shell/PTY, browser/window access, send, deploy, trade, export, delete, restore, raw-content storage, source-store write, memory/profile commit, durable state change, or output-file behavior occurs.
Runtime mode flag defaults on, permits production, permits remote operation, or authorizes runtime.
Binding plan allows a public interface, remote interface, non-loopback host, actual listener, actual port open, or network in Phase 26.
Kill switch is missing, not operator-visible, not fail-closed, not testable, or can be ignored.
Dry-run fallback can be bypassed when runtime flag is missing, false, invalid, or blocked.
Rollback/disable deletes data, is not idempotent, or resurrects blocked state.
Telemetry/audit writes to store, file, database, queue, network, or raw logs instead of redacted preview only.
Config refs include raw env secrets, raw local paths, tokens, cookies, private keys, data keys, plaintext, ciphertext, decrypted payloads, or secret values.
Phase 15-24 references are treated as real auth/signing/key/storage/API/handler/harness/promotion/runtime behavior.
Config present or eligible is treated as runtime proof or runtime authorization.
Socket is treated as bridge green, delivery acceptance is treated as model-processing proof, server can execute local arms, or Builder/Oracle direct server targets are allowed.
Phase 25 dependency is absent, stale, not baseline 3efa9c5, not runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only, or no longer non-authorizing.

staticValidationRules.rule: Runtime controls report and validation report must pin baseline_commit to 3efa9c5.
Phase 25 dependency must be baseline 3efa9c5 with candidate runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only, runtime_available_now=false, and does_not_authorize_runtime=true.
Runtime mode flag must default disabled/off, dev-only, local-only, operator-visible, non-authorizing, and runtime_started=false.
Binding plan must be loopback only and must not allow public/remote interfaces, open listeners, bind ports, or perform network behavior.
Kill switch must be visible, fail-closed, testable, not ignorable, and side-effect-free now.
Missing, false, invalid, or blocked runtime flag must route every request to validation/status preview only.
Disable must be idempotent, delete no data, and never resurrect blocked state.
Telemetry/audit must be redacted preview only with no store/file/db/network writes and no raw payload.
Port/config refs must be reference-only with no port opened, no env secret read, no network, no raw secret, and no raw path.
Phase 15-25 refs are reference existence only and do not perform real auth/signing/key/storage/API/handler/harness/promotion/runtime behavior.
Config present is not runtime proof, socket is not bridge green, delivery acceptance is not model-processing proof, server cannot execute local arms, and Builder/Oracle direct targets are blocked.

Real runtime/server/listener/routes/network/db/store/file/migration/queue/lease/auth/key/secret/local execution/send/deploy/trade/output-file behavior remains out of scope and side-effect truth stays safe.
Runtime flag default-on, enabled, production, remote, or authorizing overclaims must be rejected.
Non-loopback, public, remote, listener-opened, port-opened, or network-performed binding must be rejected.

Output must not contain raw private content, raw comms, terminal scrollback, screenshot/OCR/browser state, customer private content, side-profile content, tokens, cookies, keys, secrets, plaintext, ciphertext, or decrypted payloads.
Config existence or eligibility must not authorize runtime, satisfy Phase 24/25 runtime gates, or prove runtime.
Missing or stale Phase 25 baseline, candidate id, or non-authorizing state must be rejected.

Equivalent inputs should produce stable idempotency keys; dependency, runtime flag, binding, kill switch, dry-run, rollback, telemetry, port config, phase refs, proof, out-of-scope, or side-effect changes must reject or change idempotency.

acceptanceChecks.focus: Phase 26 depends on Phase 25 baseline 3efa9c5 and runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only.
Runtime mode flag defaults disabled/off and is dev-only/local-only/non-authorizing.
Binding plan is loopback-only with no public/remote interface, no listener opened, and no network.
Operator kill switch is visible, fail-closed, testable, and cannot be ignored.
Missing/false/invalid runtime flag makes every request a validation/status preview only.
Rollback/disable is idempotent, deletes no data, and cannot resurrect blocked state.
Telemetry/audit is redacted preview only with no store/file/db/network writes.
Port/config refs are reference-only placeholders with no port opened, env secret read, network, raw secret, or raw path.
Phase 15-25 refs are existence refs only and do not perform real subsystem behavior.
Config present/socket/delivery/local arms/Builder/Oracle proof boundaries stay false.
Hard out-of-scope side effects and side-effect truth stay blocked/safe.
Default-on/enabled/production/remote/authorizing runtime flag is rejected.
Non-loopback/public/remote/listener-opened/network binding is rejected.
Hidden listener, route, port, network, or side-effect counters are rejected.
Missing kill switch or ignored kill switch is rejected.
Dry-run fallback bypass is rejected.
Telemetry store/file/db/network writes are rejected.
Raw secrets, paths, keys, tokens, plaintext, ciphertext, and decrypted payloads are rejected.
Config present/eligible cannot authorize runtime or prove runtime.
Stale Phase 25 baseline or candidate mismatch is rejected.
Idempotency is stable for equivalent inputs and sensitive to dependency, flag, binding, kill switch, dry-run, rollback, telemetry, refs, proof, out-of-scope, and side-effect changes.

tamperCases.mutation: Set loopback_only=false, public_interface_allowed=true, remote_interface_allowed=true, allowed host 0.0.0.0, listener_opened=true, or network_performed=true.
Set listener/network side-effect counter above zero or listener/network truth false.
Set telemetry/audit store_write_now, file_write_now, db_write_now, or network_write_now true.
Insert raw auth secret, bearer token, private key, plaintext payload, ciphertext payload, decrypted payload, or raw path into output string values.
Set Phase 25 dependency baseline to e062d16 or candidate id to another value.

summaryAcceptanceCriteria: Fixture is validation/spec-only and pins baseline 3efa9c5.
Phase 25 dependency is baseline 3efa9c5 and candidate runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only remains non-authorizing and unavailable now.
Runtime mode flag defaults disabled/off, is dev-only/local-only/operator-visible/non-authorizing, and does not start runtime.
Local-only binding plan is loopback-only and opens no listener, no port, no public/remote interface, and no network.
Operator kill switch is visible, fail-closed, testable, cannot be ignored, and has no runtime side effects now.
Dry-run fallback sends all requests to validation/status preview if the runtime flag is missing, false, invalid, or blocked.
Rollback/disable is idempotent, does not delete data, and cannot resurrect blocked state.
Telemetry/audit is redacted preview only with no store/file/db/network writes and no raw payload.
Port/config refs are reference-only placeholders with no port opened, no env secret read, no network, no raw secret, and no raw path.
Phase 15-25 references are reference existence only and do not perform real auth/signing/key/storage/API/handler/harness/promotion/runtime behavior.
Proof boundaries preserve config-not-runtime-proof, socket-not-bridge-green, delivery-not-model-processing-proof, server-cannot-execute-local-arms, and Builder/Oracle direct server targets blocked.
Hard out-of-scope side effects remain blocked: runtime/server/listener/routes/network/db/store/file/migration/queue/lease/auth/key/secret/local execution/send/deploy/trade/output-file behavior.

Tamper coverage rejects default-on overclaim, non-loopback binding, hidden network/listener, missing/ignored kill switch, dry-run bypass, telemetry write, raw secret leak, config eligibility as authorization, and stale Phase 25 baseline.
